name: OpenClaw Session Bloat Warning
description: Compaction-surface warning plugin for OpenClaw with calm pre/post compaction notices and bundled session-bloat-warning guidance.

stateFilePath.description: Optional path to the plugin-owned warning state JSON file. Defaults to ./.openclaw-session-bloat-warning-state.json in the current working directory.

defaultLanguage.description: Language for user-facing warning copy. Defaults to en.

enablePreCompactionWarning.description: Whether to emit a short warning on before_compaction. Defaults to true.

enablePostCompactionNote.description: Whether to emit a short continuation note on after_compaction when the event carries a writable messages array. Defaults to true.

maxWarningsPerSession.description: Maximum number of pre-compaction warnings and post-compaction notes per session key. Defaults to 2.
